name: Soupe a L'oignon Au Fromage - French Onion So
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook the onions in the butter over moderate heat, stirring until they are golden brown.
2. Sprinkle with flour and cook the mixture, stirring, for 3 minutes.
3. Gradually add the broth, stirring the soup constantly until it comes to a boil.
4. Reduce the heat and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Arrange 2 slices of toasted bread in each of 6 heated bowls.
7. Top each slice of toast with 1 tablespoon cheese.
8. Pour the soup over the cheese on top of the toast.
9. Sprinkle any remaining cheese on top.
10. Broil the bowls for about 4 inches from the flame for 3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
1951 Gourmet Magazine favorite.
